title: Spicy Cherry Crumble
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring sweet cherries topped with a crunchy, spicy crumble. Perfect for any time of the year.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cherries and sugar.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together gluten-free flour, spicy, and cold unsalted butter until crumbly.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the cherry filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
